features.name: interface with initial block
features.description: Code should include an interface declaration with an initial block using an unlabeled begin...end

features.name: interface with always_comb block
features.description: Code should include an interface declaration with an always_comb block using an unlabeled begin...end containing a foreach loop

features.name: multiple unlabeled begin blocks in interface
features.description: Code should include an interface with both initial and always_comb blocks, each using unlabeled begin...end at procedure level
features.snippet:
interface Itf (input bit [31:0] regs [1]);
  initial begin
  end
  always_comb begin
  end
endinterface

features.name: module instantiating interface with parameterized array
features.description: Code should include a module that instantiates an interface passing an unpacked array as parameter
